<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you want to propose -->

<!-- Describe the problem this feature would solve -->

<!-- Describe how you envision this feature working -->

<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered -->

## Use Cases
<!-- Explain the use cases or scenarios where this feature would be beneficial -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, mockups, or examples -->

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- Define the requirements that must be met for this feature to be complete -->
